title: Community, History & World Around Us
subject: History & Social Studies
description: Learn about family, community helpers, historical traditions, and working together.
learningObjectives: Identify community helpers (firefighters, doctors, farmers, builders).

lessons.title: Helpers in Our Community
lessons.content: Farmers grow our food! Doctors keep us healthy! Builders construct safe homes! Firefighters keep us safe! Everyone has an important job in a community.

flashcards.definition: A group of people who live and work together in the same place.
Special customs passed down from parents to children over time.

questions.question: Which community helper grows vegetables, grains, and fruit for us to eat?

practicalChallenge.title: Community Helper Thank You Card
practicalChallenge.instruction: Draw a picture of a farmer or doctor helping people and share it with your family!
